frontmatter.title: Pensieve (Web Tracker)
frontmatter.summary: A web scraper that builds analytics and insights from external websites, covering job listings and real estate data.

project.html:
Overview

A webscraper that helps to build a number of analytics and insights from external websites.

Features

  • Job listing tracking
  • Zillow house tracking
  • Diamond price tracking

Background

Provides a few use cases to track external data. Being able to track job listings can help understand what the market is looking for and what they are paying.
